title: EXP Vacuum
description: A chest that sucks up and stores EXP orbs
body:
## How to build an EXP Vacuum
You'll need a chest, an item frame, and a glass bottle.

Place the chest and then place the item frame anywhere on the chest with your glass bottle inside that frame.

That's it. Simple.

![EXP Vacuum](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1Aug4gBd/images/5628669574ea257660773d926d645e961816a646.png)

## How it works
Any exp orb(s) within 12 blocks of an exp vacuum chest will be collected and stored. When the EXP collected reaches or exceeds a value of 7 EXP (which is the average dropped amount from one bottle of enchanting) it will insert 1 bottle of enchanting in the exp vacuum chest.

See [my other mods](https://modrinth.com/user/Pepsied)
